From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Album by Gene Ammons

For the song by Mýa, see [G.M.O. (Got My Own)](/wiki/G.M.O._(Got_My_Own) "G.M.O. (Got My Own)").

| --- | --- |
|  | |

| Recorded | October 28 & 30 and November 1, 1972 |
| Studio | [Van Gelder Studio](/wiki/Van_Gelder_Studio "Van Gelder Studio"), Englewood Cliffs, New Jersey |

| |  |  |  | | --- | --- | --- | | *[Free Again](/wiki/Free_Again_(Gene_Ammons_album) "Free Again (Gene Ammons album)")* (1972) | ***Got My Own*** (1972) | *[Big Bad Jug](/wiki/Big_Bad_Jug "Big Bad Jug")* (1972) | | |

Professional ratings

| Review scores | |
| --- | --- |
| Source | Rating |
| [Allmusic](/wiki/Allmusic "Allmusic") | StarStarHalf star[[1]](#cite_note-Allmusic-1) |
| *[The Rolling Stone Jazz Record Guide](/wiki/The_Rolling_Stone_Jazz_Record_Guide "The Rolling Stone Jazz Record Guide")* | StarStar[[2]](#cite_note-RSJRG-2) |

***Got My Own*** is an album by saxophonist [Gene Ammons](/wiki/Gene_Ammons "Gene Ammons") recorded in 1972 and released on the [Prestige](/wiki/Prestige_Records "Prestige Records") label.[[3]](#cite_note-3)

## Reception

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Got_My_Own&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Reception")]

[Allmusic](/wiki/Allmusic "Allmusic") awarded the album 2½ stars with its review by [Scott Yanow](/wiki/Scott_Yanow "Scott Yanow") stating, "Ammons's huge sound makes the music worthwhile".[[1]](#cite_note-Allmusic-1)

## Track listing

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Got_My_Own&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Track listing")]

1. "[Lady Sings the Blues](/wiki/Lady_Sings_the_Blues_(song) "Lady Sings the Blues (song)")" ([Billie Holiday](/wiki/Billie_Holiday "Billie Holiday"), [Herbie Nichols](/wiki/Herbie_Nichols "Herbie Nichols")) - 5:30
2. "[God Bless the Child](/wiki/God_Bless_the_Child_(Billie_Holiday_song) "God Bless the Child (Billie Holiday song)")" (Holiday, [Arthur Herzog, Jr.](/wiki/Arthur_Herzog,_Jr. "Arthur Herzog, Jr.")) - 4:05
3. "[Strange Fruit](/wiki/Strange_Fruit "Strange Fruit")" ([Abel Meeropol](/wiki/Abel_Meeropol "Abel Meeropol")) - 3:30
4. "[Fine and Mellow](/wiki/Fine_and_Mellow_(song) "Fine and Mellow (song)")" (Holiday) - 5:30
5. "[Play Me](/wiki/Play_Me "Play Me")" ([Neil Diamond](/wiki/Neil_Diamond "Neil Diamond")) - 6:00
6. "[Ben](/wiki/Ben_(song) "Ben (song)")" ([Don Black](/wiki/Don_Black_(lyricist) "Don Black (lyricist)"), [Walter Scharf](/wiki/Walter_Scharf "Walter Scharf")) - 5:30
7. "The Shack Out Back" (Gene Ammons) - 7:58

* Recorded at Van Gelder Studio in Englewood Cliffs, New Jersey on October 28, 1972 (tracks 1, 5 & 6), November 30, 1972 (tracks 3 & 4) and November 1, 1972 (tracks 2 & 7)

## Personnel

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Got_My_Own&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Personnel")]

* [Gene Ammons](/wiki/Gene_Ammons "Gene Ammons") - [tenor saxophone](/wiki/Tenor_saxophone "Tenor saxophone")
* Ernie Hayes - [organ](/wiki/Electronic_organ "Electronic organ") (tracks 1, 4, 5 & 7)
* [Hank Jones](/wiki/Hank_Jones "Hank Jones") - [electric piano](/wiki/Electric_piano "Electric piano") (tracks 1 & 3–6)
* [Sonny Phillips](/wiki/Sonny_Phillips "Sonny Phillips") - [piano](/wiki/Piano "Piano"), organ (tracks 2 & 7)
* [Joe Beck](/wiki/Joe_Beck "Joe Beck") (tracks 1, 4, 5 & 6), Maynard Parker (tracks 2 & 7) - [guitar](/wiki/Guitar "Guitar")
* [Ron Carter](/wiki/Ron_Carter "Ron Carter") - [bass](/wiki/Double_bass "Double bass"), [electric bass](/wiki/Electric_bass "Electric bass")
* [Billy Cobham](/wiki/Billy_Cobham "Billy Cobham") (tracks 2 & 7), [Idris Muhammad](/wiki/Idris_Muhammad "Idris Muhammad") (tracks 1, 5 & 6), [Mickey Roker](/wiki/Mickey_Roker "Mickey Roker") (tracks 3 & 4) - [drums](/wiki/Drum_kit "Drum kit")
* [Ed Bogas](/wiki/Ed_Bogas "Ed Bogas") - [arranger](/wiki/Arrangement "Arrangement")
* Unidentified strings
